message:
chore(e2e): make WebKit browser projects opt-in

WebKit/Safari requires host dependencies that may be missing in minimal
Linux environments (common in CI/containers). Make these projects opt-in
via PLAYWRIGHT_INCLUDE_WEBKIT=1 environment variable.

This prevents Playwright from failing when WebKit deps aren't installed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
